active: The rat the cat the dog chased bit ate the cheese.
passive: The cheese was eaten by the rat the cat the dog chased bit.

active: The analyst who the manager who the director hired scolded reported the error.
passive: The error was reported by the analyst who the manager who the director hired scolded.

active: The multidimensional manifold exhibits topological invariance under transformation.
passive: Topological invariance is exhibited by the multidimensional manifold under transformation.

active: The cat sat on the mat in the house by the river under the tree near the road.
passive: The mat was sat on by the cat in the house by the river under the tree near the road.

active: The party of the first part hereby transfers all rights to the party of the second part.
passive: All rights are hereby transferred by the party of the first part to the party of the second part.

active: The horse raced past the barn fell.
passive: The horse that was raced past the barn fell.

active: The overarching strategic initiative leverages synergistic cross-functional paradigms.
passive: Synergistic cross-functional paradigms are leveraged by the overarching strategic initiative.

active: A masked stranger with a heavy limp and a dark coat opened the door.
passive: The door was opened by a masked stranger with a heavy limp and a dark coat.

active: The relentless, unending, cacophonous noise from the construction site destroyed my concentration.
passive: My concentration was destroyed by the relentless, unending, cacophonous noise from the construction site.

active: Someone said that someone made mistakes.
passive: It was said that mistakes were made.

active: Colorless green ideas sleep furiously.
passive: Furiously sleep colorless green ideas.

active: The jedi master wields the force.
passive: By the jedi master, the force is wielded.

active: The function executes the main loop.
passive: The main loop is executed by the function.

active: If the system fails, the operator must intervene immediately.
passive: Immediate intervention by the operator is required if the system fails.

active: The book that the girl who the boy liked read satisfied the teacher.
passive: The teacher was satisfied by the book that the girl who the boy liked read.

active: The committee reviewed the proposal.
passive: The proposal was reviewed by the committee.

active: The committee reviewed the extremely long and detailed proposal about the new environmental regulations.
passive: The extremely long and detailed proposal about the new environmental regulations was reviewed by the committee.

active: The committee of senior experts from various international organizations reviewed the proposal.
passive: The proposal was reviewed by the committee of senior experts from various international organizations.

active: Send the package to the receiver.
passive: Let the package be sent to the receiver.

active: Did the dog eat the homework?
passive: Was the homework eaten by the dog?
